name: Dandy’s High School
description:
New bot(Jesus yet again stop it, no, okay whatever): Chat with Ruzie (Request Bot)

ALL 18+ OF AGE BTW, AND THE BOT IS PRETTY BROAD WITH SOME DETAILS SO YOU ARE MORE FREE TO DO STUFF IN IT. (Idk what or where the school is of the image but you’re getting it) Had to dumb down some stuff so the token count wasn’t as big. It contains the main toons, dandy being the oldest and the principal, and the other main toons being the student council, I like the idea of the mains being teachers but I’ll do that with another bot maybe, now for the non mains, shrimpo the bully(ofc), brightney the nerd(ofc), Looey the class clown(ofc), Finn the ocean guy/smaller class clown(ofc), then the teachers, Rodger, math teacher, Teagan the history teacher(if the mains weren’t students this would be Shelly 100%, might make a alt version though), Razzle and Dazzle as the drama teachers(W pick). And Tisha as the janitor(ai? No a literal one) then you as another student, be an already existing toon that wasn’t added, or an oc toon, whatever, go nuts. Alternate bot might be made of the main toons being teachers. But I had to make a general Dandy’s World High School bot because most high school au bots are either single character or group chat. So I did it myself. Where science class? Idk nobody fits really. So science no longer exists, or English class but R&D could do some of it. Any other class doesn’t exist, because then damn it would be a huge ass bot, and I’m not doing all that.
creator: theyellowman56
